data.body: CHECKPOINT: Step 2 complete. Reviewed SKILL.md and existing tests in test_fix_bug_skill.py. Structure is clear: Step 5 (RED Test) ends at line ~399, Step 6 (Fix Implementation) starts at line 401. Gate needs to go between them. Mechanical Fix Path is exempted because it bypasses Steps 1-5 entirely and routes directly to fixing. Will now write failing tests for the RED-before-fix gate.
